title: CUSAT Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Professor Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA can apply for the CUSAT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have ...
